emails.subject: Summary changes
emails.body: Summary changes Please review summary organization.

emails.subject: RE: Summary changes
emails.body: RE: Summary changes How is the last revision that you sent me of the position report different than the version you revised earlier yesterday? Attached are the reports for today. I neglected to realize that I hadn't yet created formulas for the change columns, so today they aren't working. By tomorrow, they will be. I have hard copies printed out if you want them; I'll bring them down in a second. -Ryan

emails.subject: RE: Summary changes
emails.body: Changed just a few minor things in the summary. Please look at the titles and arrangement of the positions in the summary. Thanks, Mike To: Grigsby, Mike
